g.title: public.oauth_identities:user_id->public.users:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.items:category_id->public.categories:id

g.title: public.items:user_id->public.categories:user_id
